function solve(landStartTime: number[], landDuration: number[], waterStartTime: number[], waterDuration: number[]): number {
    let minTime = Infinity;
    const n = landStartTime.length;
    const m = waterStartTime.length;
    for (let i = 0; i < n; i++) {
        for (let j = 0; j < m; j++) {
            // Scenario A: land first then water
            const landStart = landStartTime[i];
            const landEnd = landStart + landDuration[i];
            const waterStart = Math.max(landEnd, waterStartTime[j]);
            const waterEnd = waterStart + waterDuration[j];
            const scenarioA = waterEnd;
            
            // Scenario B: water first then land
            const waterStartB = waterStartTime[j];
            const waterEndB = waterStartB + waterDuration[j];
            const landStartB = Math.max(waterEndB, landStartTime[i]);
            const landEndB = landStartB + landDuration[i];
            const scenarioB = landEndB;
            
            const currentMin = Math.min(scenarioA, scenarioB);
            if (currentMin < minTime) {
                minTime = currentMin;
            }
        }
    }
    return minTime;
}
